[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person centered in the frame with a question mark above their head and the text “CINA BINGUNG” at the bottom.

The main subject is a person with short dark hair, wearing rectangular glasses with light-colored frames, facing the camera straight-on. A small black-and-white question mark symbol is placed above the top of their head, and they have a neutral expression with their mouth closed.

The setting is unclear; the background appears to be a plain light gray surface with soft, even lighting.

The image composition is a tight head-and-shoulders crop, with the question mark at the top center and large bold white text with black outlines reading “CINA BINGUNG” at the bottom.

Visible Text:
CINA BINGUNG
?

Practical Summary:
The image is a meme-like close-up of a person looking at the camera. It includes a question mark above their head and large bold text at the bottom.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
